response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern tooling like Docker and Git. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq and has built end-to-end systems across frontend and backend, including internal tooling and automation platforms. His work with AWS CDK, Kubernetes, MongoDB, and testing frameworks like Vitest (via Fluent-Asserts and Trial) aligns with the primary stack and required skills. He demonstrates strong architecture skills through open-source contributions, performance optimization in high-throughput systems, and DevOps practices. His education from MIT satisfies the degree requirement. His German is only basic, but the role is in Berlin and team collaboration is English-dominant. His broad language proficiency (Java, Kotlin via DLang and Java experience) and AI-agent work are strong positives. His primary concern is the lack of explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in his resume, though his experience with Node.js, testing, and modern frameworks suggests adaptability. His use of DLang and legacy stacks (Ember.js) may raise questions about current focus, but his recent roles are TypeScript/Node/React-heavy.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with strong emphasis on TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and internal tooling development
Deep expertise in testing, DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in recent work, though equivalents are present
Limited evidence of recent Kotlin/Java usage despite listed skills
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder local collaboration
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the experience threshold with a robust track record in full-stack development, AI-agent systems, and enterprise tooling using the core stack. His open-source contributions, DevOps rigor, and architectural depth strongly align with the role’s demands. While he lacks explicit Nest.js or Vitest exposure, his deep Node.js and testing experience suggest quick onboarding. The minor language barrier is outweighed by his technical strength and English fluency.
